messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi! I actually need help with a couple of things. I recently moved to a new house, but it’s still on Elm Avenue here in Houston. I noticed that one of my recent orders was sent to my old address, and I want to make sure it gets sent to my new place instead. Also, I’d like to update my default address in your system to the new one. Can you help me with that? I’d prefer not to give my address again since it should be in my recent orders. 

And one more thing—I’d like to exchange my tablet for the cheapest one you have, since I’m trying to save money after the move.

message.content:
Hi! I actually need help with a couple of things. I recently moved to a new house, but it’s still on Elm Avenue here in Houston. I noticed that one of my recent orders was sent to my old address, and I want to make sure it gets sent to my new place instead. Also, I’d like to update my default address in your system to the new one. Can you help me with that? I’d prefer not to give my address again since it should be in my recent orders. 

And one more thing—I’d like to exchange my tablet for the cheapest one you have, since I’m trying to save money after the move.
